caption: 可损通知

view.params:
SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[样品管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[样品管理.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT yhzl.SID,yhzl.zwmc
FROM yhzl
ORDER BY yhzl.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.SID=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="主营行业")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

fields.name: 是否已向保兑银行催款(0否1是)

view.params:
SELECT kh.kh_id
FROM kh
ORDER BY kh.kh_id ASC

SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

view.params:
SELECT wxht.order_id,wxht.SID
FROM wxht
WHERE   (wxht.customer=:customer)
    AND CheckRole('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxht.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
